specific_question: What year did MediConn Solutions conduct internal research to identify AI use cases within the company?
answer: MediConn Solutions conducted internal research in the year 2024 to identify AI use cases in various departments at MediConn Solutions.
dr_question: Starting in 2026 through Q1 2027, how can MediConn Solutions integrate the use of AI in creating the right patient experience, starting from the first touch point through care delivery and follow up to increase the number of patients that engage with their tele-health services?
